claim_boundaries: OpenRouter free-model TextGrad candidate-generation diagnostics only; accepted candidates require recorded loss-gate improvement and are not field validation.
OpenRouter free model availability can change; failures are recorded as evidence, not silently discarded.
API keys are read from environment variables and must not be written to command lines, manifests, or result artifacts.
